mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, amount, actual_amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_order WHERE status = 'PENDING' LIMIT 1000;
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order_history (order_id, order_no, user_id, amount, actual_amount, status) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.userId}, #{item.amount}, #{item.actualAmount}, #{item.status})
